zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mortimer於1295年9月14日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素時，她的父親Hugh de Mortimer24歲，母親Matilda Hereford23歲。她於1304年與Geoffrey Cornwallis在英國史洛普爾布福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年12月25日在英國史洛普爾布福德享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Mortimer于1295年9月14日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素时，她的父亲Hugh de Mortimer24岁，母亲Matilda Hereford23岁。她于1304年与Geoffrey Cornwallis在英国史洛普爾布福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年12月25日在英国史洛普爾布福德享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mortimer was born on 14 September 1295, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Mortimer, was 24 and her mother, Matilda Hereford, was 23. She married Geoffrey Cornwallis in 1304, in Burford, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 December 1345, in Burford, Shropshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mortimer est née le 14 septembre 1295, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Mortimer, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Matilda Hereford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Cornwallis en 1304, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1345, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Mortimer am 14. September 1295 in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Mortimer 24 und ihre Mutter Matilda Hereford 23. Sie hat 1304 in Burford, Shropshire, England Geoffrey Cornwallis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1345 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Burford, Shropshire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mortimer è nata il il 14 settembre 1295 nel Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Mortimer, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Matilda Hereford, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey Cornwallis nel 1304, nel Burford, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1345, nel Burford, Shropshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Mortimerが1295年9月14日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Mortimerは24歳，母Matilda Herefordは23歳であった。1304年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードでGeoffrey Cornwallisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年12月25日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mortimer(이)가 1295년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Mortimer(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Hereford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1304년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 Geoffrey Cornwallis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 12월 25일 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.14 September 1295–25 December 1345: 14 de setembro de 1295–25 de dezembro de 1345
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mortimer nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1295, em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Mortimer, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Hereford, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Cornwallis em 1304, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1345, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mortimer родилась 14 сентября 1295 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Mortimer было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Hereford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Cornwallis в 1304 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 декабря 1345 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.14 September 1295–25 December 1345: 14 de septiembre de 1295–25 de diciembre de 1345
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Mortimer nació el 14 de septiembre de 1295, en Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Mortimer, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Matilda Hereford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Geoffrey Cornwallis en 1304, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1345, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
